Sales_Trend.why: Shows Sales & Profit trends simultaneously on same time axis

Category_Performance.why: Enables direct comparison of Sales vs Profit across categories

Regional_Heatmap.why: Geographic encoding for spatial revenue distribution by state

Channel_Attribution.why: Ranked channel comparison; easy to read text labels for channel names

Customer_Segment_Analysis.why: Compare multiple metrics (AOV, Profit) across customer segments

Delivery_Analysis.why: Shows distribution of customer rating by delivery speed category
